productDisplayName: Nike Women Steady VIII White Sports Shoes
description: Super light-weight and extremely attractive, these Steady VIII cross trainers from nike give you the kind of all-day comfort that your feet truly deserve. Excellent for all your Sports endevours and casual wear as well. Just be prepared for all the jealous glances you get!UpperSynthetic upper for durability and styleMesh panels on the side for improved breathabilitySynthetic overlays for added structure and stylePerforations on the forefoot for better ventilationLace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized FitLushly padded tongue and well-cushioned collar for in-step comfort and a secure fitMesh tongue for improved ventilationBrand tab on tongueBrand name appliqued on collarnike Swoosh embossed on both sides  and on forefootMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and supportWell cushioned footbed for all day comfortMesh lining for increased ventilationOutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorptionFlex grooves for ease of movementDiamond pattern grooves for improved tractionshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
